ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library where the document is stored */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the document is stored */,
  "call_number" TEXT /* Call number of the document */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the document */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the document */,
  "year_published" INTEGER /* Year the document was published */,
  "report_number" TEXT /* Report number of the document */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the document was last modified */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document is confidential */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the library */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the library */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the library */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the library */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the library's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor number of the location */,
  "room" TEXT /* Room number of the location */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the author is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the author */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the author's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document type is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the document type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkout_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the status was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkout_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkout event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being checked out */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user checking out the document */,
  "checkout_date" TEXT /* Date the document was checked out */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the document was returned */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the checkout event */,
  "renewal_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the document has been renewed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes related to the checkout event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkout_history_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkout_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkout_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES checkout_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, librarian, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
